title: Context Relationships
description: Stratigraphic relationship constraints for Harris Matrix and graph validation. Validates that a set of context records forms a valid Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG).

contexts.description: Collection of context records to form a stratigraphic graph

no_self_loops.description: A context cannot cut or fill itself

no_cycles.description: Stratigraphic relationships must form a DAG (no A cuts B cuts A)
